title: Project Onboarding Execution Root
description: Shared feature container for packaging the orchestrator CLI and delivering project initialization for a single target repository. This bead is non-runnable and exists to coordinate the dependent implementation, validation, documentation, and review work for the spec.
acceptance_criteria: All concrete work for packaging, onboarding, validation, documentation, and review is represented in child beads.
Child bead ordering reflects small, dependency-driven implementation slices rather than one large implementation task.
The combined child plan covers the stated acceptance criteria without pulling in deferred multi-repo, GUI, or remote-execution scope.
